query_text: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT AVG(credits_used) AS avg_credits, MAX(credits_used) AS max_credits, DATE_TRUNC('hour', start_time) AS hour, SUM(credits_used) AS hourly_credits, warehouse_name, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM snowflake.account_usage.warehouse_metering_history WHERE start_time >= '2026-04-10' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', start_time) AS hour, warehouse_name ORDER BY hourly_credits DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC
SELECT * FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= DATEADD('day', -1, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT i.current_stock, i.warehouse_location, s.avg_daily_units, i.reorder_point, ROUND(i.current_stock / NULLIF(s.avg_daily_units, 0), 1) AS days_of_stock FROM operations.inventory.stock_levels i JOIN (SELECT product_id, AVG(quantity) AS avg_daily_units FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items WHERE order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY product_id) s ON i.product_id = s.product_id WHERE i.current_stock <= i.reorder_point * 1.5 ORDER BY days_of_stock ASC

SELECT event_date, event_type, platform, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND event_type IN ('page_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_start', 'purchase') GROUP BY event_date, event_type, platform ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, s.utm_medium, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, s.utm_campaign, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= '2026-04-05' GROUP BY s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT shipping_address, billing_address, customer_segment, lifetime_value, phone_number, updated_at, customer_id, account_status, email, preferred_channel, customer_name, created_at, loyalty_tier, signup_date FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers WHERE customer_id = 334951

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT c.customer_id, c.email, c.billing_address, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date)) AS active_months, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.customer_segment = 'Consumer' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.email, c.billing_address ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.order_status, o.total_amount, c.customer_name, c.email, c.customer_segment, r.region_name, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.discount_amount, p.product_name, p.product_category FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, STDDEV(o.total_amount) AS stddev_order_value FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_segment, c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email HAVING DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) > 90 ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT payment_status, receipt_url, payment_method, net_amount, payment_id, stripe_charge_id, created_at, failure_message, description FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= '2026-04-01' AND payment_status = 'refunded'

SELECT c.customer_name, c.email, c.preferred_channel, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, MIN(o.order_date) AS first_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date)) AS active_months, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.customer_segment = 'Enterprise' HAVING lifetime_value > 100 GROUP BY c.customer_name, c.email, c.preferred_channel ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(oi.unit_price) AS avg_selling_price, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-15' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(oi.unit_price) AS avg_selling_price, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, p.product_subcategory, p.product_category, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-07' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, p.product_subcategory, p.product_category ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC
SELECT * FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= '2026-04-10'

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT event_date, event_type, platform, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND event_type IN ('page_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_start', 'purchase') GROUP BY event_date, event_type, platform ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.order_status, o.total_amount, c.customer_name, c.email, c.customer_segment, r.region_name, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.discount_amount, p.product_name, p.product_category FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT AVG(po.total_amount) AS avg_po_value, AVG(DATEDIFF('day', po.order_date, po.delivery_date)) AS avg_delivery_days, s.supplier_name, MAX(po.order_date) AS last_order, COUNT(po.po_id) AS po_count, SUM(po.total_amount) AS total_spend FROM operations.procurement.purchase_orders po JOIN operations.procurement.suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE po.order_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-03-15' AND po.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.supplier_name ORDER BY total_spend DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT SUM(oi.discount_amount) AS total_discounts, p.brand, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, AVG(oi.unit_price) AS avg_selling_price, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-07' GROUP BY p.brand, p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT p.brand, AVG(oi.unit_price) AS avg_selling_price, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, p.product_category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.discount_amount) AS total_discounts, p.product_subcategory, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-20' GROUP BY p.brand, p.product_category, p.product_subcategory ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, s.utm_medium, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue, s.utm_source, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= '2026-04-07' GROUP BY s.utm_medium, s.utm_source ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-20' AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(*) AS order_count, r.region_name, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-12' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, r.region_name ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC
SELECT * FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= DATEADD('day', -1, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS unique_sessions, AVG(event_duration_ms) AS avg_duration, event_date, platform FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= '2026-04-07' AND event_type IN ('purchase', 'product_view', 'page_view') AND platform = 'web' GROUP BY event_date, platform ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT MAX(po.order_date) AS last_order, AVG(DATEDIFF('day', po.order_date, po.delivery_date)) AS avg_delivery_days, COUNT(po.po_id) AS po_count, s.supplier_category, SUM(po.total_amount) AS total_spend, AVG(po.total_amount) AS avg_po_value, s.supplier_name FROM operations.procurement.purchase_orders po JOIN operations.procurement.suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE po.order_date BETWEEN '2026-03-20' AND '2026-04-01' AND po.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.supplier_category, s.supplier_name ORDER BY total_spend DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC
SELECT * FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= DATEADD('day', -1, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.phone_number, c.billing_address, c.signup_date, c.preferred_channel, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MIN(o.order_date) AS first_order_date, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date)) AS active_months, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.customer_segment = 'Consumer' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.phone_number, c.billing_address, c.signup_date, c.preferred_channel ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT o.order_status, o.order_date, o.total_amount, c.email, oi.product_id, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount AS line_total, oi.quantity, oi.discount_amount, oi.unit_price, p.product_name, r.country FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2026-04-14' AND '2026-04-14' AND r.region_name = 'US-East' AND p.product_category = 'Clothing'

SELECT event_date, event_type, platform, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND event_type IN ('page_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_start', 'purchase') GROUP BY event_date, event_type, platform ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT MAX(po.order_date) AS last_order, s.supplier_name, COUNT(po.po_id) AS po_count, s.supplier_category, SUM(po.total_amount) AS total_spend, s.supplier_region FROM operations.procurement.purchase_orders po JOIN operations.procurement.suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE po.order_date BETWEEN '2026-04-12' AND '2026-04-05' AND po.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.supplier_name, s.supplier_category, s.supplier_region ORDER BY total_spend DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.order_status, o.total_amount, c.customer_name, c.email, c.customer_segment, r.region_name, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.discount_amount, p.product_name, p.product_category FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT metadata, payment_method, net_amount, created_at, receipt_url, fee_amount, currency, stripe_charge_id, payment_id, failure_message, description, updated_at, payment_status, amount, customer_id, failure_code FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= '2026-03-25' AND payment_status = 'succeeded'

SELECT s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT failure_message, failure_code, metadata, customer_id, receipt_url, fee_amount, net_amount, description, payment_id, payment_status, updated_at FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= '2026-03-25' AND payment_status = 'succeeded' AND amount > 500

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT SUM(po.total_amount) AS total_spend, MAX(po.order_date) AS last_order, s.supplier_region, AVG(DATEDIFF('day', po.order_date, po.delivery_date)) AS avg_delivery_days, s.supplier_name, COUNT(po.po_id) AS po_count FROM operations.procurement.purchase_orders po JOIN operations.procurement.suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE po.order_date BETWEEN '2026-03-20' AND '2026-04-14' AND po.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.supplier_region, s.supplier_name ORDER BY total_spend DESC

SELECT AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts, COUNT(*) AS order_count, r.region_name FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-25' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, r.region_name ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue, r.region_name, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-10' AND r.region_name = 'EU-West' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT c.customer_segment, DATEDIFF('day', c.signup_date, CURRENT_DATE()) AS account_age_days, c.customer_id, SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend_90d, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS return_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_90d, MAX(o.total_amount) AS max_order_90d, MIN(o.total_amount) AS min_order_90d, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date)) AS active_weeks, COUNT(DISTINCT o.region_id) AS regions_ordered_from, STDDEV(o.total_amount) AS stddev_order_90d FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY c.customer_segment, c.customer_id

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.region_id) AS regions_ordered_from, c.customer_segment, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_90d, MIN(o.total_amount) AS min_order_90d, SUM(o.total_amount) AS spend_90d, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS return_count, STDDEV(o.total_amount) AS stddev_order_90d, DATEDIFF('day', c.signup_date, CURRENT_DATE()) AS account_age_days FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY c.customer_segment

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-25' AND r.region_name = 'LATAM' AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, r.region_name ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-05' AND r.region_name = 'APAC-Southeast' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, r.region_name ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT s.supplier_category, s.supplier_name, AVG(po.total_amount) AS avg_po_value, MAX(po.order_date) AS last_order, COUNT(po.po_id) AS po_count, AVG(DATEDIFF('day', po.order_date, po.delivery_date)) AS avg_delivery_days, s.supplier_region, SUM(po.total_amount) AS total_spend FROM operations.procurement.purchase_orders po JOIN operations.procurement.suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE po.order_date BETWEEN '2026-03-20' AND '2026-04-01' AND po.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY s.supplier_category, s.supplier_name, s.supplier_region ORDER BY total_spend DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT i.reorder_point, s.avg_daily_units, i.warehouse_location, i.current_stock, ROUND(i.current_stock / NULLIF(s.avg_daily_units, 0), 1) AS days_of_stock, i.lead_time_days FROM operations.inventory.stock_levels i JOIN (SELECT product_id, AVG(quantity) AS avg_daily_units FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items WHERE order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY product_id) s ON i.product_id = s.product_id WHERE i.current_stock <= i.reorder_point * 1.5 ORDER BY days_of_stock ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS ticket_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.satisfaction_score >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS csat_rate, DATE_TRUNC('day', t.created_at) AS day, t.category FROM operations.support.tickets t WHERE t.created_at >= '2026-04-12' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', t.created_at) AS day, t.category ORDER BY day DESC

SELECT o.total_amount, o.order_status, c.email, c.customer_segment, c.phone_number, c.customer_name, oi.product_id, oi.discount_amount, oi.unit_price, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount AS line_total, p.brand, p.product_category, r.region_name FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2026-03-25' AND '2026-04-14'

SELECT o.order_id, o.total_amount, o.order_status, c.customer_segment, oi.quantity, oi.product_id, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount AS line_total, oi.unit_price, p.sku, r.country FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-14' AND r.region_name = 'EU-Central'

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000
SELECT * FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= DATEADD('day', -1, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT customer_id, account_status, customer_segment, updated_at, email, preferred_channel, customer_name, shipping_address, phone_number, billing_address, created_at, loyalty_tier, signup_date FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers WHERE customer_id = 488033

SELECT description, payment_id, customer_id, failure_code, metadata, receipt_url, updated_at, stripe_charge_id, currency, failure_message, payment_status FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= '2026-04-10' AND payment_status = 'failed'

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-20' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT event_date, event_type, platform, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND event_type IN ('page_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_start', 'purchase') GROUP BY event_date, event_type, platform ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.billing_address, c.customer_segment, c.phone_number, c.preferred_channel, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date)) AS active_months FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.customer_segment = 'Enterprise' HAVING lifetime_value > 1000 GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.billing_address, c.customer_segment, c.phone_number, c.preferred_channel ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_inactive, c.customer_name, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, c.customer_segment, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order, STDDEV(o.total_amount) AS stddev_order_value, c.email, c.customer_id, c.signup_date FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_name, c.customer_segment, c.email, c.customer_id, c.signup_date HAVING DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) > 90 ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT c.customer_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_inactive, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spend, STDDEV(o.total_amount) AS stddev_order_value, c.signup_date, c.customer_id FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_name, c.signup_date, c.customer_id HAVING DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) > 30 ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary, SUM(CASE WHEN e.hire_date >= DATEADD('month', -3, CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_hires_90d, MIN(e.hire_date) AS earliest_hire, e.job_title, d.department_name, e.location, SUM(CASE WHEN e.hire_date >= DATEADD('month', -6, CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_hires_180d FROM hr.public.employees e JOIN hr.public.departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE e.employment_status = 'active' GROUP BY e.job_title, d.department_name, e.location ORDER BY department_name, headcount DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue, SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-05' AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT AVG(event_duration_ms) AS avg_duration, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS unique_sessions, event_date FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= '2026-03-25' AND event_type IN ('signup', 'product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'search') AND platform = 'api' GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC
SELECT * FROM raw.stripe.payments WHERE created_at >= DATEADD('day', -1, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts, SUM(o.total_amount) - SUM(o.discount_amount) AS net_revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-10' AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS unique_visitors, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0) AS conversion_rate, SUM(o.total_amount) AS attributed_revenue FROM marketing.public.sessions s LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON s.user_id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date = s.session_date WHERE s.session_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY s.utm_source, s.utm_medium, s.utm_campaign ORDER BY attributed_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.order_status, o.total_amount, c.customer_name, c.email, c.customer_segment, r.region_name, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.discount_amount, p.product_name, p.product_category FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC

SELECT AVG(event_duration_ms) AS avg_duration, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS unique_sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users, platform, COUNT(*) AS event_count, event_type FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= '2026-04-10' AND event_type IN ('purchase', 'search', 'signup', 'product_view') GROUP BY platform, event_type ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) AS week, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS active_customers, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(o.total_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS revenue_per_customer FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', o.order_date) ORDER BY week DESC
SELECT * FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers WHERE customer_id = 323016

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, r.region_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(*) AS order_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, SUM(o.discount_amount) AS total_discounts FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-20' AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, r.region_name ORDER BY daily_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, p.brand, p.product_subcategory, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, p.product_category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.discount_amount) AS total_discounts FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-03-25' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, p.brand, p.product_subcategory, p.product_category ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT platform, event_type, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS unique_sessions, AVG(event_duration_ms) AS avg_duration, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users, event_date FROM analytics.product.fact_events WHERE event_date >= '2026-04-12' AND event_type IN ('checkout_start', 'add_to_cart', 'page_view') GROUP BY platform, event_type, event_date ORDER BY event_date DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.order_status, o.total_amount, c.customer_name, c.email, c.customer_segment, r.region_name, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.discount_amount, p.product_name, p.product_category FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id JOIN analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE())

SELECT c.signup_date, c.email, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, c.customer_name, STDDEV(o.total_amount) AS stddev_order_value FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.signup_date, c.email, c.customer_name HAVING DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) > 30 ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment, COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(o.total_amount) AS lifetime_value, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(o.order_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_order FROM analytics.sales.dim_customers c LEFT JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, c.customer_segment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS gross_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost_price)) AS gross_margin, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers FROM analytics.sales.fact_order_items oi JOIN analytics.sales.fact_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN analytics.sales.dim_products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -30, CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY p.product_category, p.product_subcategory, DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS headcount, AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary, d.department_name, SUM(CASE WHEN e.hire_date >= DATEADD('month', -6, CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_hires_180d, e.job_title, e.location FROM hr.public.employees e JOIN hr.public.departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE e.employment_status = 'active' GROUP BY d.department_name, e.job_title, e.location ORDER BY department_name, headcount DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC

SELECT r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) AS day, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS unique_buyers, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM analytics.sales.fact_orders o JOIN analytics.sales.dim_regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_DATE()) AND o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name, DATE_TRUNC('day', o.order_date) ORDER BY day DESC, daily_revenue DESC
